'''Salteract''' was a celestial body<ref name="Abduction">''[[The Abduction]]''</ref> located in the [[Salteract system/Legends|Salteract system]], a part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Rayter sector/Legends|Rayter sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> At some point by the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the crew of a [[II-xC Maintenance/Broadcast Ship]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] stored into the [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] [[Computer/Legends|computer]] system a flight plan from Salteract to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Narg]].<ref name="Abduction" />

==Behind the scenes==
Salteract was introduced in ''[[The Abduction]]'', a [[1992]] [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] adventure authored by [[Chuck Truett]] and published by [[West End Games]] for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Abduction" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Salteract [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square J-19.<ref name="TEA" />

==Appearances==
